---
applyTo: "**/*Test*.java,**/*.spec.ts,**/*Spec*.java,**/playwright.config.ts,**/karma.conf.js"
description: "Automatically triggered when working with test files or when user asks about test generation, test quality, flaky tests, or mutation testing"
---

# Testing Skills

When working with test files or user asks about testing:

- **playwright-test-generator** (`.claude/skills/playwright-test-generator/SKILL.md`)
  Triggers: "write Playwright tests", "E2E tests", "UI automation", "API tests",
  "test suite", "automated tests", "test this feature"

- **test-data-builder-generator** (`.claude/skills/test-data-builder-generator/SKILL.md`)
  Triggers: "test data builders", "test fixtures", "builder pattern", "test data",
  "anOrder()", "fluent test setup", "object mother"

- **flaky-test-detector** (`.claude/skills/flaky-test-detector/SKILL.md`)
  Triggers: "flaky tests", "intermittent failures", "unreliable tests",
  "Thread.sleep in test", "test ordering", "test sometimes fails"

- **mutation-testing-reporter** (`.claude/skills/mutation-testing-reporter/SKILL.md`)
  Triggers: "mutation testing", "PITest", "Stryker", "mutation score",
  "are my tests good", "test effectiveness", "surviving mutants"

- **bdd-scenario-generator** (`.claude/skills/bdd-scenario-generator/SKILL.md`)
  Triggers: "BDD", "Gherkin", "Cucumber", "Given When Then", "feature files",
  "acceptance tests", "scenarios from requirements"

Load the relevant SKILL.md before generating test code.
